landing.title: Find a Worthy Celebration
landing.subtitle: A city-first archive for Catholic churches, Mass times, liturgical character and the living pulse of parish life.
landing.featureBody: Ordofinder pairs public discovery with reviewer-led verification, regional stewardship and archival presentation.
landing.cityFeatureBody: Browse the strongest city archives first, then move deeper into local churches, schedules and trusted signals.
landing.opening: An archive is not a list. It is a promise that the beautiful and the true in a city are not lost to casualness. Ordofinder orders churches by the dignity of their celebration, by place, and by the voice in which they speak.

cities.title: City Archive
cities.subtitle: Choose a city to open its churches, schedules and editorial notes.

submit.title: Submit a Church
submit.subtitle: Help expand the archive with trustworthy, precise, charitable submissions.

city.alsoSubtitle: Below the editorial threshold, but listed for completeness.
city.empty: No churches in this city yet. Check back soon.

masses.heading: Upcoming Masses
masses.subtitle: The next celebrations in this city, with time, quality rating and distance from your location. Click a row for the church archive.
masses.empty: No Mass times on record for the next two weeks.
masses.emptyFiltered: No Masses match these filters. Loosen them to see more.

nearby.heading: Catholic Mass near you, right now
nearby.lead: Share your location and we will show the next celebrations at the closest churches — sorted by time, with quality rating and distance.
nearby.denied: Location was denied. You can still browse the city archive.
nearby.unsupported: Your browser does not support location access. Please browse by city.
nearby.leadLocated: The {count} closest churches in the archive, sorted by walking distance.
nearby.upcomingSubtitle: Across all nearby churches, sorted chronologically with quality rating and distance.
